title: Kerala polls: Congress-led UDF manifesto promises ‘Indira guarantees’, five ‘dream’ projects and boost for health, higher education sectors
description: Five guarantees include free bus travel for all women in KSRTC buses, ₹1,000 monthly financial aid for college-going girl students, increase in welfare pension to ₹3,000 per month, ₹25-lakh health insurance cover for every household and interest-free loans up to ₹5 lakh for the youth to start own business
